last_cycle_summary: Completed one bounded backend/API scoping cycle. Re-read V1 docs/status, backend Aletheia routes, repository interfaces, local/Supabase repositories, runtime persistence, document chunk migrations, and the shared V1 contract facade. Implemented a narrow authenticated V1 source-index route for local storage that lists matter-scoped DocumentRecord-like documents, DocumentChunk-like chunks, and evidence source links for Export/Audit and Eval/Skills consumers. Supabase V1 source listing remains explicitly unavailable and fails closed.

decision.minimum_contract: Add a read-only authenticated source-index API before downstream Export/Audit and Eval/Skills work. Do not block those lanes on Supabase retrieval or a public persistV1RuntimeResult API for the local/private pilot.
decision.runtime_api_scope: No new public persistV1RuntimeResult route was added this cycle. Existing authenticated create/resume agent-run routes remain P0 scaffold/resume paths; local repository-level persistV1RuntimeResult is available for runtime owners, but Supabase and retry-from-approval wiring remain blocked.
decision.supabase_scope: Supabase V1 document/chunk/source listing, upload/search, and V1 runtime persistence remain unimplemented and return CapabilityNotAvailableError where reached.

blockers: Supabase V1 document upload/search/source listing is still unavailable.
No authenticated public route invokes persistV1RuntimeResult yet.
No create/resume integration retries a run from an external_model_call approval checkpoint.
No real external provider transport was implemented, by design.

launch_recommendation.required_caveat: Downstream lanes must label Supabase/runtime API gaps as local-only limitations and must not claim external-provider or Supabase readiness.

next_actions: Export/Audit should consume GET /aletheia/matters/:matterId/v1/source-index for source document/chunk/evidence-link manifests in local mode.
Eval/Skills should use the local source index plus ReviewComment/eval helper contracts, keeping skill candidates inactive until human approval.
A future backend cycle can add a guarded internal persistV1RuntimeResult API or one-shot scheduler create/resume integration if downstream work proves it is required.
A future storage cycle must either implement Supabase V1 document retrieval/runtime persistence or keep release docs explicitly local-only.
